arts.sum: Wolves head to the capital to take on FA Cup winners Crystal Palace in the Premier League tonight. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Crystal Palace’s celebrations will be cut short when the Eagles return to Premier League action against Wolves tonight. Oliver Glasner’s side secured the first major trophy in the club’s history on Saturday, beating Manchester City 1-0 to win the FA Cup at Wembley.
